title: chrysogonum stenocephalum
intro: Chrysogonum stenocephalum, also known as Green Adder's Mouth or Green Dragon, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chrysogonum stenocephalum include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
